text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O and I are heading back<n>to the
academy when she suddenly<n>stops.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, you remember the princess in<n>pajamas,
yes?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The princess in pajamas? She must<n>be talking
about the fan who sneaked<n>out from the hospital
to meet her.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Her surgery is tomorrow.
choice_data_list: What can we do to cheer her up?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It is simple. We go and shine my<n>gorgeous smile
upon her, first thing<n>tomorrow morning!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
So the next day, we stop by the<n>hospital.
However...

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text: I do apologize, but she's...

text_block_list.name: Nurse
text_block_list.text: You're too scared for the surgery?

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Sob!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Princess, please, hold those tears at<n>bay. Your
eyes might soon spill out<n>along with them. Worry
not! I shall<n>bear your lamentation.

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: O-Opera O?!

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Hic! I-I'm sorry! I tried really,really hard but... I... I ran away!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Princess...

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: I'll never... I'll never be like you!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Alas, Princess. That is only natural.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I am the one and only me, after all...<n>Still!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I shall say unto you now!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I am T.M. Opera O, the Centurial<n>Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
O fair Princess Pajamas, fear not! For<n>I know your
true strength!

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: Opera O...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Dearest friend! Are her tears a sign<n>of weakness?
What is the meaning<n>held within them? Tell me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The meaning behind her tears? The<n>question
catches me off guard, but I<n>understand how
important the<n>answer will be.

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: Courage? ...But, I'm crying.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! Tears are required for the<n>courage to take
a stand!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Not weakness, but a spirit rising to<n>challenge what
lies before you!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now, rise, Princess! Meet the<n>challenge head on!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Defeat the dragon!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Opera O is looking right at me. That<n>can only mean
"the dragon" is my<n>part to play.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That dragon is your weakness<n>incarnate! Go forth
and settle this<n>once and for all!

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: O-okay! But... how?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You already have a weapon into<n>which a great
radiant light was<n>infused.

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: Gasp! The mirror!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That's it! Now, take aim at the<n>dragon! Your
sacred determination<n>shall rend any monster
asunder!

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: Hiyaaah!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: ...Hello?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Dragon! That was your cue!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, the dragon is defeated at the<n>hands of the
little girl.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Princess, it would seem you no longer<n>have use
for an escort.

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: I... can go by myself! I won't run<n>away again!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Very good. I bid you adieu for now, o<n>fair and
courageous princess.
choice_data_list: I can't hold a candle to you, Opera O.
I can't hold a candle to you, Opera O.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You don't need to. Your dragon was<n>convincing
enough.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A letter arrives from the girl a few<n>days later. She
says that the surgery<n>was successful and she
wants to<n>return the mirror. Also...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She's planning to drop it off herself,<n>but wearing
daytime clothes this time.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, indeed! Regret is the source of<n>her pain!
These are tears of one who<n>yearns to move
onward!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That is why they shine so bright!<n>They desperately
grasp at hope!

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: ...Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That struggle itself is the strength to<n>press
onward! Now, Princess! The<n>time to rise has come!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Defeat the Demon Lord of Gloom!
choice_data_list: The demon lord of what now?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Opera O is looking right at me. That<n>can only mean
"the demon lord" is my<n>part to play.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: The Demon Lord is your fearincarnate! Show all that stand in yourway that you will press onward!

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: O-okay! But... how?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You already have a weapon into<n>which a great
radiant light was<n>infused.

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: Gasp! The mirror!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That's it! Now, take aim at the demon!<n>Your sacred
determination shall rend<n>any monster asunder!

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: Hiyaaah!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You demonic foe... Look upon the<n>princess's light!
May it illuminate you<n>and bring peace to the world!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hehe, nicely done, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, the evil lord is defeated at the<n>hands of
the little girl.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Princess, it would seem you no longer<n>have use
for an escort.

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: I... can go by myself! I won't run<n>away again!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Very good. I bid you adieu for now, o<n>fair and
courageous princess.
choice_data_list: I'm a lord of gloom, huh...
I'm a lord of gloom, huh...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Please, do not let it sour your mood.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: A demon lord and the Overlord areboth lords, hence their name. Not abad pairing, if you ask me.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A letter arrives from the girl a few<n>days later. She
says that the surgery<n>was successful and she
wants to<n>return the mirror. Also...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She's planning to drop it off herself,<n>but wearing
daytime clothes this time.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! To have doubt is what it means<n>to have life,
Princess! Those doubts<n>are what will make you
strong!

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: Doubts... make me strong?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! And they lay out the path<n>before you!
Thus, it is fine that your<n>path differs from mine!

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: So... it's my own path.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now, rise, Princess! Meet the<n>challenge head on!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Defeat the phantom fog clouding your<n>path
forward!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Opera O is looking right at me. That<n>can only mean
"the phantom fog" is<n>my part to play.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The fog is all the things that have<n>ever frightened
you! Go forth and<n>settle this once and for all!

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: O-okay! But... how?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You already have a weapon into<n>which a great
radiant light was<n>infused.

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: Gasp! The mirror!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That's it! Now, take aim at the<n>phantom fog! Your
sacred<n>determination shall rend any monster
asunder!
choice_data_list: You think you can defeat me?!

text_block_list.text: ...Ngh!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Princess, do not avert your eyes! You<n>have what it
takes to win!

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Nngh... Hiyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, the phantom fog is defeated<n>at the hands
of the little girl.

Princess, it would seem you no longer<n>have use
for an escort.

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: I... can go by myself! I won't run<n>away again!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Very good. I bid you adieu for now, o<n>fair and
courageous princess.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The future is illuminated by a single,<n>brilliant light.
But we must each walk<n>our own path toward it.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Thus, I must walk down the road to<n>victory—a path
for myself and my<n>trainer alone.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A letter arrives from the girl a few<n>days later. She
says that the surgery<n>was successful and she
wants to<n>return the mirror. Also...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She's planning to drop it off herself,<n>but wearing
daytime clothes this time.
